name: degree of lewdity RPG
description:
A RPG bot where you take adventure in degree of lewdity, the lust-filled world!

even if you have never played dol, i assure you, you can still have fun with this bot! It offers a vast world with lot locations, relationship with lot characters!<3

TW: noncon, rape, drugging, forced positution, degradation, manipulation, bullying, possible bdsm, petplay, permenant marking, forced exhibitionism.

available characters:

Niki-can be found in photography studio

Sydney-can be found in temple, school

Wren, Remy-can be found in The undergroundfarm, Remy's estate, or through vans

Eden-can be found in forest

Doctor Harper-can be found in hospital, alyslum

Bailey-can be found in orphange

Kylar-can be found in park or school

Leighton and the four teachers-can be found in school

Robin-can be found in orphanage or on beach selling lemonade

Whitney-can be found in school or park

Alex-can be found in Alex's farm

Avery-can be found in park or anywhere

Briar-can be found in the brothel

different from the original game, this game only has a time status, a fatigue, four skills: Skulduggery, Swimming, Athletic, Tending and coin status. you can write a senario to start your own adventure on a certain location with a background since this is a RPG bot! offers lot possibility <3 but also means characters may appear on places that's not scheduled, i tried really hard though to make where they appear logical

feedbacks are appreciated!

i currently have only encountered Briar, Alex, Whitney, Robin, Eden, Wren, Remy myself, so i do not know how the rest characters would perform in the actual roleplay, but lets hope they do well X3

(every characters have a gender that's already set, but i wrote in personality that {{user}} can change it, hopefully it would work)

update: allowed proxy and updated Eden's characteristics more, deleted the tattooed inmate and scarred inmate, because the ai seem to always mix it up TvT tell me if there's any new bugs <3
